Record your entire bike adventure by combining 2 Garmin devices with the Garmin VIRB XE Bike Combo Mount.
This combo-bike support provides an easy installation for a Edge bike computer and a VIRB X or XE on your handlebar.
This lowers your total weight by combining to supports into one and keep your cockpit clean.
This support with extra long arm ensures you have a comfortable upright sit for a better view and more safety.
You mount the Edge to the top and the VIRB to the bottom of the mount.
The support is made of sturdy material, for stable footage and a good readability of your Edge bike computer.
Past perfect, zit super vast.
Bra fäste för att montera cykellyse under cykeldator, har GoPro fäste under och Garmin ovan.
Skulle helst varit lite längre.
De Garmin VIRB Combo Fietssteun is een uitstekend product.
Makkelijk te monteren, sterk en degelijk.
Perfect, Mijn vader had er blijkbaar al een gekocht, ( het was een cado voor mijn vader ) maar die andere was te kleine, dus toen probeerde hij deze en paste perfect, hij is er super blij mee.

Donam Market, located in seongbuk-gu at line 4 Seongshin woman's university station was established at 1970.
The market is quite easy to found.
From exit 3 of line 4 Seongshin Woman's University Station make your way to the right of the exit and go straight.
돈암시장은 1970년대 조성된 상설시장으로 되었습니다.
4호선 성신여대입구역 3번출구로 나오셔서 왼쪽으로 조금만 오시면 쉽게 찾을 수 있는 돈임 시장.
전통시장인데 너무나 깨끗하고 깔끔하게 지어진다.
시장 안에도 대형 터치스크린 설치되어있으며 시장 정보를 쉽게 찾을 수 있다.
시장의 컨셉때문에 요긴 쇼핑을 쉽고 편하게 할수 있는 시장입니다.
Another reason why i come to this market is for eat of course!
!Donam Market is famous for its Sundae, Kimbab, and Gamjatang (감자탕) or pork back bone soup.
I tried the mini kimbab at Gamikkomakimbab - 가미꼬마김밥 and Donam Sundae - 돈암 순대 which already featured at various tv shows, both of them are the recommended food when you visited this market.
The mini kimbab was sold at 500won each and sundae for 4000 both are tasty.
If you are in Korea and want to search a good place for eat with ur friend or family near Seongshin Woman University, this is the place that you don't want to missed.
